name: webstack
description: Fullstack web service harness for Claude Code — guides identity-driven design system, multi-repo scaffolding, contract-first API, parallel feature development with worktrees, and free-tier IaC (NextJS+ShadCN+Tailwind+FSD-lite / Spring+Kotlin+DDD+Modulith+KoTest / Vercel+Oracle+Supabase+OpenTofu).
